# Sunesis

Sunesis is a Slovenian enterprise software engineering and technology company founded in 2014.

Sunesis designs, builds and operates AgenticAI solutions, API ecosystems, enterprise digital platforms, cloud-native architectures, DevOps foundations and Kumuluz platforms.

Sunesis works with organizations in banking, insurance, public sector, energy, manufacturing, blockchain infrastructure, open-source ecosystems and European research and innovation projects.

## Core positioning

Sunesis helps organizations build secure, scalable and production-ready enterprise platforms where AgenticAI, APIs, workflows, data and business systems work together.

## Key expertise

Sunesis provides expertise in:
- AgenticAI solutions and enterprise AI assistants
- API ecosystems, API management, Business APIs and integrations
- Enterprise digital solutions development
- Cloud-native and edge architectures
- DevOps and platform engineering
- Open-source engineering
- Research and innovation projects

## Kumuluz

Kumuluz is the Sunesis product and platform family for:
- KumuluzAI Platform
- Kumuluz API
- Kumuluz Business APIs
- Kumuluz Digital Platform
- Kumuluz Crowdsensing

More detailed Kumuluz product content is available at https://kumuluz.com/

Selected Sunesis references include:
- NLB Klik
- RikoAI
- AgenticAI Platform — Zavarovalniška skupina Sava
- Flare
- INATrace
- CUPID
- KYC — NLB
- eSpis — Supreme Court
- IKA — Supreme Court
- EPUS — Plinovodi
- Akrapovič Website
- Akrapovič Business Portal
- Inorma — Zavarovalniška skupina Sava
- Energetika Moj utrip

## Open source and ecosystems

Sunesis has open-source engineering experience through projects such as INATrace and CUPID, connected with Linux Foundation ecosystems including AgStack and LF Energy.

## Contact

For project, partnership, research, open-source or career inquiries, use:
https://sunesis.si/en/#contact
